title: Connect to Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL with the SDK
summary: Connect to Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL with the SDK

sections.title: Connect to Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL with the SDK
sections.summary: Connect to Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL with the SDK

lessons.title: Use the Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL SDK
lessons.content_md:
Learn about the Azure Cosmos DB libraries, and then download the libraries to use in a .NET, Python, or JavaScript (Node.JS) application.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/use-azure-cosmos-db-sql-api-sdk/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Use the Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL SDK

lessons.title: Configure the Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL SDK
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to configure the Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL SDK in various ways including how to integrate with the emulator, implement parallelism, and create a custom logger.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/configure-azure-cosmos-db-sql-api-sdk/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Configure the Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL SDK

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Connect to Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL with the SDK
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Connect to Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL with the SDK**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
